summary: AtBat subscriber AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is an Audio Only subscriber
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user views the AppleTV+ game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN the AppleTV+ pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay
